overall.description: Game engine footage from a wizarding school setting, showing students in robes moving through a grand medieval great hall with high wooden ceilings and stone architecture. The stationary camera is positioned at an elevated angle overlooking the dining area, capturing natural light streaming through gothic windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with dining tables and students in robes

events.description: student in dark robes passes close to camera on left side, temporarily blocking view
student with blonde hair passes close to camera in left foreground

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the great hall from an elevated balcony position, watching students move through the dining area

notable_agents.action: student walking from right side toward the center tables, joining others
student walking past the camera in the left foreground, moving toward the background

entered.detail: massive curved wooden beam framing the left side of the view with intricate grain patterns
long wooden tables with attached benches arranged in rows throughout the hall
stone stairs with balustrade leading up to an upper balcony in the background
ornate black iron chandelier hanging from the ceiling with multiple candle arms
tall gothic arched windows casting beams of sunlight across the floor
dark grey stone walls with tapestries and medieval architectural details

segments.scene_description: A static elevated view of a medieval great hall with gothic architecture, where students in dark robes walk among wooden dining tables. Sunlight streams through tall windows on the left, illuminating the stone floor and iron chandelier. Students move through the space in various directions, with some passing close to the camera position.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static elevated perspective of a grand medieval great hall, capturing the steady flow of students within a space defined by gothic architecture. It begins with a wide view of the stone floor and heavy wooden dining tables, where students in dark robes move in various directions. As the camera holds its position, sunlight streams through tall gothic windows on the left, casting bright beams across the hall and illuminating a hanging iron chandelier. The scene remains focused on this atmospheric intersection of light and shadow as students pass close to the elevated vantage point, weaving through the architectural expanse.
